title: Knowledge base information
content: This knowledge base is a rudimentary way of manually updating what you know and remember. In the future, incorporation of RSS feeds and other systems will keep you up to date.

title: Current year
content: The current year is 2026. The user is building LUMA Lite, a local terminal assistant using Ollama and Python.

title: LUMA architecture
content: LUMA uses Ollama locally, streams responses, keeps short-term chat history, stores memory in JSON, and has Python tools for actions like opening and closing apps.
